features.appDescription: AI-powered document analysis for electrical engineering projects
features.uploadDescription: Drag & drop technical documents for instant AI analysis. Supports files up to 50MB.
features.chatDescription: Ask questions and get instant answers from your documents. Understands technical terminology.
features.summaryDescription: Get structured summaries of electrical specifications, materials, and requirements.
features.poweredBy: ✨ Powered by Google Gemini AI - Advanced language understanding for technical documents

dashboard.title: My Documents
dashboard.emptyStateHint: Upload your first PDF to get started.

document.summaryTooltip: View AI-generated structured summary of electrical specifications
document.chatTooltip: Ask questions and get detailed answers from this document

upload.title: Upload Document
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop a PDF file here

uploadProgress.title: Processing Your Document
uploadProgress.subtitle: This usually takes 30-60 seconds
uploadProgress.tip: 💡 Tip: You can close this window and come back later. We'll notify you when processing is complete.

chat.emptyState: Ask me anything about this document
chat.suggestion1: What are the main electrical specifications?

footer.poweredBy: Powered by React, Firebase and n8n

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At PDF Technical Assistant, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding it.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.item2: Generate summaries and answer questions about your documents
dataUsage.item3: Improve the accuracy and quality of our services
dataUsage.item4: Maintain the security of your account

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing with Third Parties
dataSharing.intro: We share data with the following service providers:
dataSharing.gemini: We process your document content to generate summaries and answers
dataSharing.firebase: Storage for authentication, files, and metadata
dataSharing.supabase: Storage of vector embeddings for semantic search

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration. This includes encryption in transit and at rest, secure authentication, and strict access controls.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.deletion: Request deletion of your account and all your data
userRights.export: Export your data in a readable format
userRights.objection: Object to the processing of your data

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your data while your account is active. If you delete your account, all your data will be permanently deleted from our systems within 30 days.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy or wish to exercise your rights, contact us through your account settings.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using PDF Technical Assistant, you accept these terms of service. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

service.title: Service Description
service.content: PDF Technical Assistant is an AI-powered technical document analysis platform. It allows you to upload PDFs, generate automatic summaries, and ask questions about document content.

obligations.title: User Obligations
obligations.intro: By using the service, you agree to:
obligations.item2: Maintain the security of your account
obligations.item3: Not share your password with third parties
obligations.item4: Use the service only for legitimate purposes

prohibited.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibited.item1: Uploading illegal, offensive content or content that infringes third-party rights
prohibited.item2: Attempting to access other users' accounts
prohibited.item3: Using the service to distribute malware or spam
prohibited.item4: Reverse engineering or attempting to compromise security

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: You retain all rights to the documents you upload. We retain rights to the software, design, and functionality of the platform.

limitations.title: Service Limitations
limitations.intro: The service is subject to the following limitations:

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee absolute accuracy of AI-generated summaries or answers. Users should verify critical information.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your access to the service if you violate these terms. You can delete your account at any time from settings.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes by email.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions about these terms, contact us through your account settings.
